zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings於1150年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓時，他的父親William FitzRobert de Hastings40歲，母親Hawise Guerres31歲。他和Lady Maud de Flamville至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1195年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings于1150年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓时，他的父亲William FitzRobert de Hastings40岁，母亲Hawise Guerres31岁。他和Lady Maud de Flamville至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1195年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings was born in 1150, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzRobert de Hastings, was 40 and his mother, Hawise Guerres, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Lady Maud de Flamville. He died in 1195, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings est né en 1150, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzRobert de Hastings, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Hawise Guerres, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Maud de Flamville. Il est décédé en 1195, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings 1150 in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzRobert de Hastings 40 und seine Mutter Hawise Guerres 31. Er hatte mit Lady Maud de Flamville mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1195 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings è nato il nel 1150 nel Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William FitzRobert de Hastings, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Guerres, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Lady Maud de Flamville. Morì nel 1195, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastingsが1150年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで生まれた時，父William FitzRobert de Hastingsは40歳，母Hawise Guerresは31歳であった。彼はLady Maud de Flamvilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1195年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings(이)가 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzRobert de Hastings(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Guerres(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Lady Maud de Flamville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings родился в 1150 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William FitzRobert de Hastings было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Guerres, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Lady Maud de Flamville. Он умер в 1195 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
